zh.Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威爾士布洛可爾普倫德加斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nesta FitzMaurice of Windsor於大約1146年出生在威爾士布洛可爾普倫德加斯特時，她的父親Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII42歲，母親Alice Montgomery45歲。她和Maurice de Prendergast至少有2個兒子。她去世於1204年1月15日享年59歲。

zh-hans.Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威尔士布洛可爾普倫德加斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nesta FitzMaurice of Windsor于大约1146年出生在威尔士布洛可爾普倫德加斯特时，她的父亲Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII42岁，母亲Alice Montgomery45岁。她和Maurice de Prendergast至少有2个儿子。她去世于1204年1月15日享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzMaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Nesta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

en.lifeSummary: When Nesta FitzMaurice of Windsor was born about 1146, in Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, was 42 and her mother, Alice Montgomery, was 45. She had at least 2 sons with Maurice de Prendergast. She died on 15 January 1204, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nesta FitzMaurice of Windsor est née environ 1146, à Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice Montgomery, avait 45 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Maurice de Prendergast. Elle est décédée le 15 janvier 1204, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nesta FitzMaurice of Windsor um 1146 in Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII 42 und ihre Mutter Alice Montgomery 45. Sie hatte mit Maurice de Prendergast mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 15. Januar 1204 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nesta FitzMaurice of Windsor è nata il circa 1146 nel Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Galles, sua padre, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Alice Montgomery, aveva 45 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Maurice de Prendergast. Morì il 15 gennaio 1204, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Wales: ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアプレンデルガスト
ja.lifeSummary: Nesta FitzMaurice of Windsorが約1146年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアプレンデルガストで生まれた時，父Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIIIは42歳，母Alice Montgomeryは45歳であった。彼女はMaurice de Prendergastとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1204年1月15日に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nesta FitzMaurice of Windsor(이)가 대략 1146년 웨일스 p브로케실르 플렌더가스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Montgomery(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Maurice de Prendergast(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1204년 1월 15일 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nesta FitzMaurice of Windsor nasceu aproximadamente 1146, em Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alice Montgomery, tinha 45 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Maurice de Prendergast. Ela faleceu em 15 de janeiro de 1204, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nesta FitzMaurice of Windsor родилась около 1146 г. в местности прендиргаст, пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Montgomery, 45. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Maurice de Prendergast. Она умерла 15 января 1204 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nesta FitzMaurice of Windsor nació aproximadamente 1146, en Prendergast, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Alice Montgomery, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Maurice de Prendergast. Murió el 15 de enero de 1204, a la edad de 59 años.
